title: agropyron pauciflorum
intro: Agropyron pauciflorum, also known as little barley or slender wheatgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron pauciflorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in herbal medicine for its potential benefits in treating various health conditions.
